articles.title: Watch: Meet the bell makers of Tiruchi’s Venkatanayakanpatti
articles.description: In the village of Venkatanayakanpatti situated 56 km from Tiruchi, these brass bell makers are the guardians of Tamil Nadu’s legacy of ‘lost wax casting’, or cire perdue, a metalworking technique that can be traced back to the Harappan civilisation. Venkatanayakanpatti once used to have over 20 family-run smithies supplying all types of metal goods to order. The number has slowly decreased to approximately five manufacturing units due to inflationary costs. The craftsmanship of these artisans remains in great demand.

articles.title: Watch: Meet the bell makers of Tiruchi’s Venkatanayakanpatti
articles.description: In the village of Venkatanayakanpatti situated 56 km from Tiruchi, these brass bell makers are the guardians of Tamil Nadu’s legacy of ‘lost wax casting’, or cire perdue, a metalworking technique that can be traced back to the Harappan civilisation. Venkatanayakanpatti once used to have over 20 family-run smithies supplying all types of metal goods to order. The number has slowly decreased to approximately five manufacturing units due to inflationary costs. The craftsmanship of these artisans remains in great demand.

topStories.title: Congress high command decides Cabinet reshuffle: Home Minister
topStories.description: G. Parameshwara says it is natural to have aspirations, and there is nothing wrong in seeking a ministerial post.

topStories.title: Jeffrey Epstein spotted in South Florida? Internet stunned as lookalike's video goes viral - See here
topStories.description: The clip that fueled speculations about Epstein being alive and spotted in South Florida, showed a man – who netizens said looked similar to Epstein – sporting a pair of sunglasses and a white cap as he cruised in a convertible. Here's what happened next

topStories.title: Work from home, avoid air travel: Here's what IEA suggests to ease oil price pressure on consumers amid West Asia war
topStories.description: The IEA advised working from home and avoiding air travel to relieve oil price pressures amid the US-Israel war with Iran. The agency suggested measures for governments and households to mitigate the economic impact of rising energy prices.

dailyNews.title: Tourists in Las Vegas pay $1,000 for dinner on the Strip while sharks eat like royalty
dailyNews.description: Mandalay Bay's lead aquarist says the resort's sharks eat better than tourists on the Strip, dining on mackerel, herring and sardines three times a week.

dailyNews.title: Slain Loyola Chicago student's family fumes over 'murder,' manhunt for masked gunman in attack near campus
dailyNews.description: The family of Loyola University Chicago student Sheridan Gorman demands answers after she was shot and killed near campus in a seemingly random attack.

dailyNews.title: Ex-FBI agents involved in Arctic Frost probe sue for wrongful termination
dailyNews.description: Two ex-FBI agents sued the bureau to challenge their firing, which they argued was an act of politically motivated retaliation tied 'solely' to their work on the Arctic Frost probe.

dailyNews.title: Snow drought grips ski industry as resorts turn to Gen Z skiers, new activities to fill lifts
dailyNews.description: From TikTok to social activities at ski resorts, Gen Z could be reshaping ski culture. Vail Resorts' CEO and a young influencer discussed making skiing more accessible for many.

dailyNews.title: I played Division1 volleyball — NIL chaos is out of control. The SCORE ACT will save sports
dailyNews.description: College sports are a prized American institution, that instills civic values such as teamwork and dedication. But without legislative action, it’s just empty rhetoric.

dailyNews.title: Jimmy Gracey's death deemed accidental after vanishing on spring break in Barcelona, police say
dailyNews.description: Spanish police say Jimmy Gracey, a 20-year-old University of Alabama student, died accidentally in Barcelona after vanishing near Shoko nightclub.

dailyNews.title: Top Dems brush off ties to Imam who held memorial for Iranian leader who vowed 'Death to America'

dailyNews.title: UNC collapses late, blows 19-point lead in shocking overtime loss to VCU
dailyNews.description: Terrence Hill Jr. scored 34 points to lead VCU's 82-78 overtime upset of No. 6 seed North Carolina, erasing a 19-point deficit in thrilling fashion.

dailyNews.title: Pat McAfee blasts potential 'high school refs' as NFL weighs replacement officials during labor talks
dailyNews.description: NFL replacement referees could return for the 2026 season if a new labor deal isn’t reached, reviving memories of the infamous 2012 “Fail Mary" debacle.

dailyNews.title: High Point's Chase Johnston delivers faithful message after scoring game-winning March Madness upset basket
dailyNews.description: Following a thrilling upset, High Point guard Chase Johnston pointed to his faith in Jesus Christ, reflecting the Panthers’ deep spiritual bond and team-first mentality.

dailyNews.description: Netanyahu's comments came after President Donald Trump, speaking in the Oval Office, said earlier that he would not send U.S. troops to the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Trump compares US strike on Iran to Pearl Harbor
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump on Thursday, seated next to Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi in the Oval Office, compared U.S. strikes against Iran to Japan's attack on Pearl Harbor during World War II.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: With Japanese prime minister at his side, Trump makes Pearl Harbor joke
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump joked about Pearl Harbor in a meeting Thursday with the Japanese prime minister.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s hand-picked panel votes to put his face on a U.S. gold coin
dailyNews.description: The proposal had been rejected by members of a separate federal coin committee — and panned by former member Kareem Abdul-Jabbar.

dailyNews.title: Tracking who Trump is appointing to fill key administration roles
dailyNews.description: Follow President Trump’s progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington Post and the Partnership for Public Service.

dailyNews.title: Vance is in a bind, supporting a war that could cost him politically
dailyNews.description: People close to JD Vance concede that a long conflict will be a challenge for the next GOP nominee but say the vice president hasn’t made up his mind about running.

dailyNews.title: Trump breaches fire wall between watchdogs and agencies they investigate
dailyNews.description: Inspectors general are subject to growing partisan pressures as the White House and political figures seek greater influence over them than ever before.
